# Muhammad Talha — MERN Stack Developer
I turn ideas into full-stack web apps with a focus on clean UX and reliability.
I build modern, scalable, and user‑friendly solutions with the MERN stack.

## Core Technical Stack
- Frontend: React, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT, Bcrypt, REST APIs

## What I Deliver
- Full-stack web applications with responsive, accessible interfaces.
- Secure authentication flows and role-based access control.
- Scalable data models and admin dashboards for operations and reporting.
- Deployment-ready builds with performance-conscious frontends.

## Project Highlights
- **Inventory Management System with POS:** MERN app with user roles, inventory tracking, automated billing, and an admin dashboard for sales and stock insights.
- **Complete Me (Next.js E‑commerce):** Product listings, user accounts, orders, and a lightweight admin panel built with Next.js App Router, TypeScript, and MongoDB.
- **BlogWise Platform:** Full-stack blog with authentication, rich‑text posts, image uploads, and a modern responsive UI using React, Express, and Appwrite.
- **IT Hub Agency Site:** Pug‑based dynamic pages with email service requests and MongoDB‑backed feedback management.

## Focus Areas
- MERN stack architecture and API design.
- Frontend engineering with Tailwind CSS and component-driven UI.
- State management with Redux Toolkit and client-side data flows.
- Authentication with JWT and password hashing with Bcrypt.
